mutation_note: Added one labeled-field precedence instruction covering compound process labels, same-country blend composition evidence, and sensory_text inclusion of explicit tasting notes plus cup-specific prose.

Tightened the sensory_text guidance to include labeled tasting notes together with directly sensory cup-description prose, and to exclude stale metadata, generic marketing, and non-sensory positioning text.
